default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss growth strategies, SEO progress, and competitor landscape.](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exec hired 2 new team members, growing to 15 FTE (not all US-based)](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [SEO metrics improving after fixing no-index issue; stat-based articles showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [GrowthX secured high-quality backlinks (DA 80, 68, 81) through team activities](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [New content strategy: mix of programmatic, stat-based, and alternative/competitor-focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

## Topics

### Exec Team Growth

  - [New sales hire started Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Contractor (head of learning) converted to full-time on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Now at 15 FTE, not all US-based](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Positive growth indicators, "a lot of opportunity"](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)

### SEO Progress and Strategies

  - [Impressions and URL clicks improving end of April](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [4-day no-index issue resolved, affecting new pages but not existing indexed content](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Stat-based article performing well early on (e.g., "AI models for role plays")](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [25 new topics added, going live end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Focus on alternative blogs and competitor comparisons (e.g., "Better Up alternative")](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Mixing programmatic, stat-based, and alternative content for robust strategy](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

### Backlink Acquisition

  - [GrowthX team secured high-quality backlinks: DA 80, 68, 81](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Full report of placed backlinks to be shared with Sean](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Competitor Landscape

  - [Sean shared Google Sheet with tagged competitor list](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Direct AI roleplay competitors: Tenor, Second Nature, Fully Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Large players: Corn Ferry ($33.2B market cap), Better Up](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Emerging competitors: Utili, Big Tin Can (both active at sales enablement conferences)](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Content Management

  - [Nem requested help with embedding Vimeo videos in Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Sean to send video tutorial on correct embedding process](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### Event Presence

  - [Exec attending/sponsoring sales enablement conferences](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [Seeing direct competition with Utili and Big Tin Can at these events](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sean to send video tutorial for Vimeo embedding in Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [GrowthX to create alternative/comparison pages for direct competitors](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Implement "versus" content as a programmatic approach](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Monitor competitor ad spend and market presence for timely alternative blog creation](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Continue focus on stat-based articles for potential "generative engine optimization"](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Sean to share any ideas for stats-based content as they arise](https://fathom.video/share/sx_ckYKDr_H3ZrsDW9SxtdJw4kXyhfz5?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

action_items.description: Send video on correct Vimeo link embedding in Contentful to Nem
Create alternative pages for direct competitors (Utili, Tenor, Hyperbound, Luster, Fully Ramped, Second Nature)
